data.content:
martinbaud

Software craftsman · Paris
Building AeryFlux — explore the world through music, news, and data on an interactive 3D globe.



---

### Open Source

| Package | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [@aeryflux/globe](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aeryflux/globe) | 3D globe for React & React Native · [demo](https://aeryflux.github.io/globe-demo) |
| [@aeryflux/xenova-bridge](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aeryflux/xenova-bridge) | Natural language intent detection (on-device) |
| [geojsonto3D](https://github.com/martinbaud/geojsonto3D) | GeoJSON to 3D globe models |
| [Lumos](https://github.com/aeryflux/lumos) | Landing page · [aeryflux.com](https://aeryflux.com) |
| [Haki](https://github.com/aeryflux/haki) | Learn to code with visual compilation |

<sub>TypeScript · Python · Three.js · React Native · Expo · Transformers.js</sub>

---

### Tools

| Project | Purpose |
|---------|--------|
| [voicemode](https://github.com/martinbaud/voicemode) | Voice conversations for Claude Code |
| [powershell-profile](https://github.com/martinbaud/powershell-profile) | Linux-like aliases for Windows |
| [dynamic-readme](https://github.com/martinbaud/dynamic-readme) | Interactive GitHub profile widgets |
| Ghidra | Reverse engineering |
| Elegoo Neptune 4 | 3D printing |

| Project | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [aerysandbox-discord-bot](https://github.com/martinbaud/aerysandbox-discord-bot) | Server/cost management · player visualization |

| [aof6_server](https://github.com/martinbaud/aof6_server) | Minecraft All of Fabric 6 |
